response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tooling (test runners, CI/CD, frameworks), and a proven track record of leadership through workshops and open-source contributions, but lacks explicit evidence of people management and organizational change leadership, which are critical for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven technical leadership via workshops, open-source projects, and cross-team infrastructure work
Broad technical stack across mobile, web, and embedded systems with strong testing and automation focus
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience beyond technical mentorship
Lacks explicit experience with mobile platform ecosystems or large-scale build/test infrastructure at scale
No mention of strategic roadmap ownership or organizational change initiatives required for the role
